_meta.purpose: Closing sentences in English for Brite Smile Dental Care. Natural wrap-up — recommendation, return plan, or simple sign-off.
rules: Mix short sign-offs with fuller recommendations
Recommendations should sound like telling a friend, not writing an ad
Don't end every review with a recommendation — mix it up
